data.title: Software stocks fell for an eighth day, with AI concerns, RAL shares near lows, IGV ETF down 30%, PLTR dropped 4.4%. Bitcoin dipped 9% to $66,000, hitting Oct 2024 levels. MSTR, MARA, CLSK each fell 12%. Silver also plunged.
data.description: Technology stocks specializing in software experienced a record eighth consecutive day of decline on Thursday, signaling the sector's most extended losing streak since May 2021. Investors are growing wary of the potential impact of artificial intelligence on Software as a Service (SaaS) economy demand. Ralliant's shares are near crucial lows, fueled by concerns over RAL's performance. The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (NYSE: IGV) tumbled 1.9%, marking a 30% drop from its late-October peak. Notably, Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR), previously seen as a prominent figure in the AI-driven software surge, plunged by 4.4% after an 11% setback on Wednesday. Key decliners in the software space were linked to crypto markets, as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) fell by 9% to $66,000, reaching levels last observed in October 2024. Stocks of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR), Mara Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MARA), and CleanSpark Inc. (NASDAQ: CLSK) each saw drops of approximately 12%. Moreover, commodity prices saw widespread declines, with silver witnessing a sharp drop. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock futures decline after tech selloff, Nasdaq down 351 points. U.S. jobless claims stable at 209,000; 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.27%. Dow -0.32%, S&P 500 -0.54%, Nasdaq 100 -0.80%. Alphabet drops 1.68% despite strong Q4 results. Fed likely to keep rates unchanged in March.
data.description: U.S. stock futures declined on Thursday after a mixed performance of benchmark indices on Wednesday, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping 351 points. Amazon.com Inc. took center stage as it reported earnings. Initial jobless claims for the week ending Jan. 31 remained stable at 209,000, slightly lower than expected. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.27%, and the two-year bond was at 3.55%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool showed a 90.1% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in March. Index performance showed declines across major indices. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was down 0.49% at $682.83, and the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF declined 0.81% to $601.82. Alphabet Inc. dropped 1.68% despite reporting strong fourth-quarter results. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed's Lisa Cook expresses concern over inflation, 'K-shaped' economy. Inflation at 2.9%, above 2% target. Policy remains steady.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook expressed a cautious stance on monetary policy at the Economic Club of Miami, describing current interest rates as mildly restrictive. She supported the FOMC's decision to maintain the policy rate, citing concerns over a "K-shaped" economic division leaving low-income families behind. Inflation remained high at 2.9% compared to the Fed's 2% target due to core goods prices rising following tariff increases. Cook emphasized the need for stronger evidence of sustainable inflation decrease before shifting focus and maintaining the Fed's credibility. Disinflation progress stalled in 2025 after improvements in previous years. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BGL sells Velocity Maintenance Solutions to Bombardier, a leading MRO provider. Transaction announced on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Chicago, a prominent independent investment bank and financial advisory firm, Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), successfully facilitated the sale of Velocity Maintenance Solutions (VMS), a top MRO provider specializing in mission-critical niche services. This transaction marks a significant milestone in the industry, involving substantial financial figures.

data.title: South Korea ends 9-year ban on corporate crypto with caps and limits. Also plans stablecoin laws and crypto ETFs.
data.description: South Korea has reopened the cryptocurrency market to corporations, but with stringent caps and asset limits in place. The move is a key aspect of a comprehensive strategy that also involves the introduction of stablecoin regulations and the potential development of spot cryptocurrency Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) in the country. The new regulations aim to ensure responsible and controlled participation in the crypto market, with specific restrictions and boundaries set to manage corporate involvement.

data.title: Panacea Financial offers $1,000 to 3 med students in Match Day 2026 to ease financial transition to residency.
data.description: Panacea Financial, a financial technology platform for doctors, has just revealed its fifth annual Match Day Giveaway in Little Rock, Ark. The platform will be offering $1,000 to three medical students who are participating in the 2026 residency match. Match Day is a crucial step in a doctor's career journey, yet it brings along financial burdens such as application fees and relocation costs. This initiative aims to alleviate some of the financial stress that future doctors face during this significant time.

data.title: Nasdaq sinks as tech stocks slump; Dow Jones falls. Tesla and Palantir extend losses. Medical device stock soars.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline, with tech stocks taking a significant hit on Tuesday. Tesla stock continued to decrease in value, extending its recent losses. The Nasdaq also sank as Palantir and Tesla faced sustained declines, while a medical device company's stock soared. This development was covered live on Investor's Business Daily.
On New Year’s Eve, rose into the night sky across illuminating it with dazzling high-tech displays to welcome the Year of the Horse.

data.title: Nutricosmetics market experiencing strong growth due to beauty & health trends. Demand for ingestible products targeting skin, hair, and anti-aging rising.
data.description: The Nutricosmetics industry is undergoing significant changes as consumer demand for comprehensive beauty and wellness solutions increases. There is a growing intersection between nutrition and personal care, with a rising preference for ingestible products aimed at improving skin health, hair quality, and anti-aging results. These trends are driving the market forward, with notable numbers indicating a shift towards more holistic approaches to beauty and health.

data.title: Inventor from Albuquerque creates SNAP-BACK canister for sunflower seeds, aiming for mess-free consumption.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, an inventor from Albuquerque, New Mexico, introduced a new way to enjoy sunflower seeds with minimal mess. The SNAP-BACK design ensures convenient consumption of sunflower seeds at sports games, while traveling, or on the go. This innovative product aims to eliminate the hassle associated with traditional methods of consuming sunflower seeds.

data.title: McBride Sisters Wine Company launches Sweet Red Frizzante under Black Girl Magic Wines brand to cater to U.S. market.
data.description: Today, McBride Sisters Wine Company introduced the nationwide release of Sweet Red Frizzante from its renowned Black Girl Magic Wines brand in Napa, California on February 17, 2026. This wine is specifically tailored for the rapidly expanding segment in the U.S. wine market. The announcement highlights a bold and subtly sparkling wine designed to capture the essence of Black Girl Magic.

data.title: Enchanted Rock names Niki Herr as Chief Marketing Officer to lead growth efforts in critical infrastructure and large-load markets. (Total characters: 107)
data.description: Enchanted Rock has appointed Herr to spearhead the integrated marketing and communications strategy as the company expands its presence in critical infrastructure and large-load markets. The announcement was made on February 17, 2026, in Houston. Enchanted Rock is known for its reliable, large-scale onsite power and microgrid solutions, and is focused on tapping into key markets to grow its influence.

data.title: Limited-time Mochaccino Devil Dogs® launched by Drake's® as part of 130th anniversary celebration.
data.description: Drake's Cakes is marking its 130th anniversary with the release of a special flavor, Mochaccino Devil Dogs®. This launch coincides with the countdown to Devil Dogs' upcoming 100th birthday. The limited-time flavor is set to excite fans as the brand celebrates its rich snacking legacy. The announcement was made in Collegedale, Tenn., on Feb. 17, 2026.

data.title: ALURA launches Alura Content Machine™ to boost digital visibility in AI-driven search. Launch date: Feb 17, 2026. From OSLO, Norway.
data.description: A company named ALURA has introduced the Alura Content Machine™ in Oslo, Norway on February 17, 2026. This system is a managed SEO+GEO content platform aimed at enhancing digital visibility and inbound demand through AI-powered search. ALURA, a Norwegian consultancy specializing in AI and automation, has unveiled this new product to support companies in improving their online presence.

data.title: Global anti-money laundering software market to reach USD 19 billion by 2033 with 16.7% CAGR growth, driven by increased online transactions and regulatory compliance.
data.description: The anti-money laundering software market is witnessing growth on a global scale, propelled by a rise in online payment methods for banking transactions. This expansion is further fueled by an increase in the use of internet-based solutions, as well as the enforcement of stringent regulations surrounding anti-money laundering practices. As of February 17, 2026, the market is thriving in PORTLAND, Ore., with significant numbers indicating the positive momentum of this sector.

data.title: Salesforce (Informatica) named leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Augmented Data Quality Solutions 18th time in 2026.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, Informatica from Salesforce, a prominent enterprise specializing in AI-powered cloud data management, has been acknowledged as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Augmented Data Quality Solutions. This milestone marks the 18th occasion Informatica has been placed in the esteemed Leaders Quadrant, showcasing the company's excellence in both "Ability to Execute" and "Completeness of Vision." The company's cutting-edge data quality features are integrated into its offerings, solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: CalmWave® introduces Recovery State for hospitals, using data to discharge patients earlier; reducing length of stay.
data.description: Seattle-based company CalmWave has unveiled Recovery State, an innovative solution utilizing their longitudinal data to assess when patients are ready for discharge or transfer to lower care levels. By leveraging high-fidelity data, hospitals can make informed decisions sooner, ultimately decreasing length of stay and readmissions. This cutting-edge tool aims to reduce non-actionable alarms, enhancing healthcare efficiency.

data.title: Over 2,100 oncology clinical trials initiated globally in 2024, with targeted therapies as fastest growing, over 100...
data.description: Posted by Oncolytics Biotech Inc. based in Vancouver, BC on February 17, 2026, Equity-Insider.com News Commentary states that in 2024, a total of 2,100 oncology clinical trials were launched worldwide. Among these, targeted therapies emerged as the most rapidly expanding subcategory, with over 100 trials conducted in this area.

data.title: Company accelerates Bitcoin purchases, buys fourth-largest amount this year, worth $48 billion.
data.description: Recently, Strategy made its fourth-largest Bitcoin acquisition of the year. This news closely followed Michael Saylor's viral defense of the company, which turned into a popular meme.

data.title: Jobley to exhibit at CDS Midwinter Meeting for the second year, showcasing its smart dental recruiting solution; event marks 161st Chicago gathering - Bellevue, Wash., February 17, 2026.
data.description: Jobley is set to showcase its intelligent dental recruiting solution for the second consecutive year at the 2026 exhibit in Bellevue, Washington. The hiring platform, catering to U.S. dental and healthcare professionals, revealed its participation as an exhibitor at the upcoming 161st event in Chicago on February 17, 2026.
